result.summary: The page is mostly well-formed, but there is one clear data/content error (a negative jackpot amount) plus several truncation and layout clipping issues on the right edge and bottom of the screen.

issues.description: The 'Cop The Lot Megaways' tile displays a negative jackpot value of '-$6,266.13', which is impossible for a jackpot and looks like a data or calculation bug.
issues.suggestion: Fix the jackpot feed/calculation so negative values never render; add a guard to hide or show a fallback value when the amount is invalid.

issues.description: The bottom row of game tiles (e.g., 'Who Wants To Be A Millionaire', 'Rakin Bacon', 'Dark Waters') is cut off and partially obscured by the fixed bottom navigation bar.
issues.suggestion: Add sufficient bottom padding to the scrollable content area equal to the height of the fixed bottom nav so tiles are never hidden behind it.

issues.description: The top navigation tab label 'Hot Gar...' is truncated (likely 'Hot Games') at the right edge of the screen.
issues.suggestion: If this is a horizontally scrollable tab bar, add a visual affordance (fade or arrow) indicating more content; otherwise adjust widths so labels don't appear awkwardly clipped.

issues.description: Game tiles in the right column of each carousel row (e.g., 'Magnificent Phoenix', 'Munchie Mil...', 'Hyperc...') are cut off mid-tile with no clear scroll affordance.
issues.suggestion: Add a gradient fade, peek spacing, or scroll indicator to make it clear the rows scroll horizontally rather than looking accidentally clipped.

issues.description: The 'i' (info) overlay buttons on game tiles are small, dark, and low-contrast against dark tile artwork, making them hard to see and tap.
issues.suggestion: Increase the info button size/contrast and ensure it meets minimum touch target guidelines (~44x44px).
